name: Andre Raw
role: Sales rep at Comeketo Catering; primary user of the Andre Sales Command Center. The user whose daily experience proves the product.
notes: Andre is the human on the execution side of the framework-instantiated sales system. System outputs are proposals-with-receipts, not commands — Andre keeps final human approval. Command Center surfaces sore-thumb-variable algebra to him; he either signs off or sends back for refinement. Proto-alignment framing: framework primitives are available to Andre as tools, not forced as constraint. Cadence=daily (afternoon text anchor). Relationship weight bumped from 0.8 to 0.85 per batch 2 framing — user-whose-daily-experience-proves-the-product. Jake to populate last_contact once TCL starts logging exchanges.
